title: mariscus boeckeleri
intro: Mariscus boeckeleri, also known as Boeckeler's sedge, is a species of plant in the family Cyperaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mariscus boeckeleri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Mariscus boeckeleri is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
